CREATE TABLE http_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content_string VARCHAR(255));

INSERT INTO http_test (id, content_string) VALUES (1, '

This line will contribute to your local entropy.

');

INSERT INTO http_test (id, content_string) VALUES (2, '

This is the initial output that will be cleared.

');
SELECT content_string FROM http_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT content_string FROM http_test WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM http_test);
SELECT content_string FROM http_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM http_test WHERE id > 0);

UPDATE http_test SET content_string = '

Now THIS is what you wanted to see, isn''t it?

' WHERE id = 2;
DELETE FROM http_test WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM http_test);
SELECT * FROM http_test WHERE content_string LIKE '%desired output%';
SELECT ct.id, ct.content_string FROM http_test ct JOIN (SELECT id FROM http_test WHERE id < 3) sub ON ct.id = sub.id;
